Name: Average time from Declaration REJECTED by PRE_APPROVER to Declaration REJECTED by EMPLOYEE
Metric: The average of the duration between activity 'Declaration REJECTED by PRE_APPROVER' and activity 'Declaration REJECTED by EMPLOYEE'

Name: Average time from Declaration REJECTED by ADMINISTRATION to Declaration REJECTED by EMPLOYEE
Metric: The average of the duration between activity 'Declaration REJECTED by ADMINISTRATION' and activity 'Declaration REJECTED by EMPLOYEE'

Name: Average time from Declaration REJECTED by SUPERVISOR to Declaration REJECTED by EMPLOYEE
Metric: The average of the duration between activity 'Declaration REJECTED by SUPERVISOR' and activity 'Declaration REJECTED by EMPLOYEE'

Name: Average time from Declaration REJECTED by BUDGET OWNER to Declaration REJECTED by EMPLOYEE
Metric: The average of the duration between activity 'Declaration REJECTED by BUDGET OWNER' and activity 'Declaration REJECTED by EMPLOYEE'

Name: Average time between Declaration SUBMITTED by EMPLOYEE and Declaration REJECTED by EMPLOYEE when preceded by a rejection from PRE_APPROVER
Metric: The average of the duration between activity 'Declaration SUBMITTED by EMPLOYEE' and activity 'Declaration REJECTED by EMPLOYEE'

Name: Total time spent in Declaration REJECTED by EMPLOYEE across all variants containing Declaration REJECTED by PRE_APPROVER
Metric: The sum of the duration between activity 'Declaration REJECTED by EMPLOYEE' and the end of case where activity 'Declaration REJECTED by PRE_APPROVER occurs

Name: Minimum time between Declaration REJECTED by PRE_APPROVER and Declaration REJECTED by EMPLOYEE
Metric: The minimum of the duration between activity 'Declaration REJECTED by PRE_APPROVER' and activity 'Declaration REJECTED by EMPLOYEE'

Name: Average duration of Declaration REJECTED by EMPLOYEE compared to the duration of Declaration SUBMITTED by EMPLOYEE in rejected loops
Metric: The average of the duration between activity 'Declaration REJECTED by EMPLOYEE' and the end of case where activity 'Declaration SUBMITTED by EMPLOYEE occurs

Name: Average time until Declaration REJECTED by EMPLOYEE is performed after the first rejection in a case involving PRE_APPROVER
Metric: The average of the duration between activity 'Declaration REJECTED by PRE_APPROVER' and activity 'Declaration REJECTED by EMPLOYEE'

Name: Total time from Declaration REJECTED by PRE_APPROVER to the subsequent Declaration SUBMITTED by EMPLOYEE, including the intermediate Declaration REJECTED by EMPLOYEE
Metric: The sum of the duration between activity 'Declaration REJECTED by PRE_APPROVER' and activity 'Declaration SUBMITTED by EMPLOYEE'

Name: Average cycle time of Declaration REJECTED by EMPLOYEE in variants that restart the process after rejection by PRE_APPROVER
Metric: The average of the duration between activity 'Declaration REJECTED by EMPLOYEE' and the end of case where activity 'Declaration REJECTED by PRE_APPROVER occurs

Name: Time elapsed between Declaration REJECTED by EMPLOYEE and the next Declaration SUBMITTED by EMPLOYEE in cases originally rejected by PRE_APPROVER
Metric: The average of the duration between activity 'Declaration REJECTED by EMPLOYEE' and activity 'Declaration SUBMITTED by EMPLOYEE'

Name: Average time for Declaration REJECTED by EMPLOYEE grouped by case:BudgetNumber in rejected-by-PRE_APPROVER pathways
Metric: The average of the duration between activity 'Declaration REJECTED by EMPLOYEE' and the end of case grouped by the last value of case:BudgetNumber filtered by the function ma > 0 where ma is the number of times `ACTIVITY` == 'Declaration REJECTED by PRE_APPROVER'

Name: Total resolution time of Declaration REJECTED by EMPLOYEE in variants where the prior activity was Declaration REJECTED by PRE_APPROVER
Metric: The sum of the duration between activity 'Declaration REJECTED by PRE_APPROVER' and activity 'Declaration REJECTED by EMPLOYEE'

Name: Minimum time it takes Declaration REJECTED by EMPLOYEE to be executed after Declaration REJECTED by PRE_APPROVER in domestic declaration cases
Metric: The minimum of the duration between activity 'Declaration REJECTED by PRE_APPROVER' and activity 'Declaration REJECTED by EMPLOYEE'

Name: Average waiting time to Declaration REJECTED by EMPLOYEE following a rejection issued by PRE_APPROVER
Metric: The average of the duration between activity 'Declaration REJECTED by PRE_APPROVER' and activity 'Declaration REJECTED by EMPLOYEE'

Name: Time from Declaration REJECTED by PRE_APPROVER to Declaration REJECTED by EMPLOYEE in cases with multiple resubmissions
Metric: The average of the duration between activity 'Declaration REJECTED by PRE_APPROVER' and activity 'Declaration REJECTED by EMPLOYEE'

Name: Average time between consecutive Declaration REJECTED by EMPLOYEE events in loops initiated by Declaration REJECTED by PRE_APPROVER
Metric: The average of the duration between activity 'Declaration REJECTED by EMPLOYEE' and activity 'Declaration REJECTED by EMPLOYEE'

Name: Total time spent in Declaration REJECTED by EMPLOYEE relative to the total processing time of the variant starting with Declaration REJECTED by PRE_APPROVER
Metric: The sum of the duration between activity 'Declaration REJECTED by EMPLOYEE' and the end of case where activity 'Declaration REJECTED by PRE_APPROVER occurs

Name: Elapsed time between Declaration REJECTED by EMPLOYEE and the final Payment Handled in cases that eventually succeed after initial rejection by PRE_APPROVER
Metric: The average of the duration between activity 'Declaration REJECTED by EMPLOYEE' and activity 'Payment Handled'
